title: Compact F3
description: A mod that reduces the useless information from F3, can be toggalable with F8.
body:
# Description
This mod, as it's name suggests, will make the F3 menu go to shame, you can toggle the menu as you wish by toggling the F8 key to open/close the menu. It shows things such as FPS, XYZ Coordinates, Speed, Time, Biome, and more, while not causing any FPS drops since the GUI is rendered at the refresh rate of the monitor, instead of refreshing it as much as the game does. This GUI is not made to condone any malicious intent towards the player or the game servers, it only does one thing, perform.

# Compability
This mod focuses on Fabric API since it's easier for me as a developer to develop this mod

[![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-f3)
[![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-f3/versions)
[![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-f3/versions)
[![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges@8494ec1ac495cfb481dc7e458356325510933eb0/assets/cozy/supported/neoforge_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-f3/versions)


This mod is created using **[IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.5 by Jetbrains](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/download/?section=windows)**
